name: Keyless
description: Keyless — Biometric authentication platform using multi-party computation to enable privacy-preserving facial recognition MFA.

seo.title: Keyless — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Keyless: Keyless — Biometric authentication platform using multi-party computation to enable privacy-preserving facial recognition MFA.

when_to_use: Privacy-preserving biometric MFA using MPC computation
Passwordless facial authentication for employee login
Biometric re-authentication for high-risk transaction approval
GDPR-compliant biometrics without server-side template storage
Zero-knowledge face auth for regulated financial services

pros: No biometric data stored on device or server
Strong MFA story for fraud-sensitive flows
cons: Liveness and spoofing still need device support
Pricing opaque and geared to enterprise
review.verdict: Interesting privacy-first biometric MFA for regulated fintech; evaluate against simpler passkey solutions first.
review.best_for: Regulated fintechs needing biometric MFA without storing templates
review.not_for: Teams that can solve their MFA problem with passkeys alone

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact-sales alone is not HWM evidence.
